name: RICE Prioritization
what_it_is: A scoring model for ranking initiatives - Reach x Impact x Confidence / Effort.
core_mechanic: Score each dimension. Divide product by effort. Rank by score.
when_to_use: Backlog needs defensible prioritization / Stakeholders pushing competing initiatives / Need to communicate tradeoffs to non-product people
when_not_to_use: Only one initiative to evaluate / Confidence scores universally low / Early discovery phase / Strategic bets (some low-RICE things are still right to do)
ideaos_application: Agent 3 scores the initiative AND surfaces which assumptions each score depends on. Skeptic challenges map onto the weakest RICE components.
